overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 walking through a futuristic urban environment, transitioning from a covered pedestrian walkway to open plazas during golden hour. The clip features dense crowds, futuristic architecture with orange structural beams, and the Medical Center building while showcasing dynamic lighting from artificial fluorescent to natural sunset.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian walkway with green carpeted flooring and overhead fluorescent lighting. Digital billboards line the concrete walls as crowds of people walk in the same direction through the semi-enclosed space.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into a wide-open futuristic urban plaza bathed in golden hour sunlight. Large orange structural arches and curved modern buildings dominate the skyline as the camera moves through the transition from artificial to natural lighting.

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open plaza featuring trees in concrete planters, benches with sitting pedestrians, and colorful graffiti art on the paved ground. The Medical Center building becomes prominent on the left while the environment opens up with scattered pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway along medical center during sunset

tall modern street lamps along the walkway
bright sun low on horizon creating lens flare and warm lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along the exterior of the Medical Center building with the setting sun creating strong backlight and long shadows. The camera moves past the building signage and digital billboards as the golden hour light intensifies, casting warm tones across the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, enclosed pedestrian corridor into a sprawling futuristic plaza bathed in the glow of a setting sun. It begins within a covered walkway featuring green carpeted floors and fluorescent lighting, moving alongside crowds past digital billboards on concrete walls. As the camera exits the enclosure, the artificial light gives way to the warm radiance of golden hour, revealing a wide-open urban space dominated by massive orange structural arches and curved modern architecture. The scene then expands across a paved plaza filled with concrete planters, benches, and colorful graffiti before turning toward the prominent Medical Center building on the left. Finally, the camera glides along the building's exterior, where the intensifying sunset creates strong backlighting and long shadows across the urban landscape.
